evidence: "If you enjoy historical drama this is a good one."
"A rich telling of this dramatic tale of family, history and complicated relationships."
"The story is embellished some for dramatic purposes but it brings the point across very well."
"It tackles some very serious issues without sugarcoating."
"I couldn't wait to move to the next episode."
"If you are patient and watch in its entirety it conveys a very interesting discussion."
"The characters were well developed and evoked passion for them."
"I was instantly drawn into the sweeping beauty of this movie."
"It can be very blunt and vulgar at times which may not be appealing to some."
"I enjoyed it and appreciated seeing real emotions and problems not always neatly resolved."
"Monika's pain as well as Helena's was articulately described."

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical and family dramas, appreciating complex narratives and slow pacing that allow for character development. They value high production quality and emotional depth in storytelling, often seeking engaging and thought-provoking content.
